ab: Vituen, malalup ku miinada da impic, karuwa u pavelas kaningku?
ch: W:Vituen，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Vituen, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: maresan ku kannu adi ku miinada, mau nantu ni Vali ini a!
ch: M:我跟你一樣沒帶，這支是Vali的!

ab: karuwa u pavelas kaningku dika? dika ku pareveriyas kannu.
ch: W:可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ai, niya!
en: Sure, take it.

ab: lrayuwan! di lrayuwan Kuwayu lra i Vali maw!
en: Thank you and thank Vali for me.

ab: ulra eman nanu kakudain diyamaw?
en: May I help you?

ab: pavaveriyas ku kanani na duwaya valray.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ai, ulra diya kakudain?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: kiyavelas ku diya kanani na teluwa valray.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ai, ikalaalup nu pukaapat wariyan mu, kadika preveliyas maw!
ch: A:好的，記得第四天要拿來還喔！
en: Sure and remember to return them on the fourth day.

ab: adi u diya pareveliyas kaningku da aicur.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: piya ku lra pareveliyas a adaman.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: man mulremes lra ku aicer?
ch: M:為何我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: lramu nu pavelasanay lra kani Udalr.
en: Maybe you lend it to Udalr.

ab: taa, kayku diya kiumalra kantaw nu kemadu.
ch: M:我不知道，如果是那樣，讓我先去問他看看。
en: I don’t know. If so, let me go and ask her first.

ab: kunu pavelasay diya kanangku aicur.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Vali, ini na kavang na pakaicas mu, nintu ipavelas kannu ni Vituen?
en: Vali, did Vituen lend you this coat?

ab: melri, ini mu, nintu iveray kaningku ni nani.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: maresan kananu kavang na pakaicas ni Vituen.
en: Vituen’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: ’ude’udem nantu kavang na pakaicas, adi maresan naniyan dulraman/pinivalrayan.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Vali, kivelas u da paisu kani Vituen?
en: Vali, did you borrow money from Vituen?

ab: ulra, pavaveliyas ku kantaw kanini na wari kema ku mu, malalup ku miinada da paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nu kemadu mu, pavaveliyas u nu aidan lra?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: nu ’emanan kuy pareveliyasaw lra kantaw.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ai, kulra rengayaw kani Vituen.
en: Okay, I will tell Vituen for you.
